date_notes: Multi-year story; date approximate, verify per-event sequence.
title_en: Alberta Health Services contracting review and wrongful-dismissal litigation
description_en: A review of Alberta Health Services medical-procurement contracts reported that conflicts of interest were widely known, and the former AHS CEO pursued a wrongful-dismissal claim against the province. The government filed a statement of defence. Several outlets reported related allegations about what officials knew.
verification_notes: Batch-authored from manual intake 2026-06-07 (4/4 sources resolved). Suppressed pending editorial verification of framing, dates, and corroboration.
